history.content:
<thought>
I am at the left side of the second row, facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward safely. To eventually reach the goal, I need to avoid the lava and take the lower open path. Turning downward will let me head around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side of the map, facing down, and the goal `O` is in the lower-right area. The cell directly below me is open, so I should move forward to start heading downward through the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the left side in the lower-middle area, facing down. The goal `O` is on the right side of the map. The cell directly below me is open, so I should move forward to continue toward the lower corridor and then head right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area, facing down. The goal `O` is on the far right side, so I need to move right toward the open corridor. Since moving down is blocked by the wall, I should turn left to face right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), but there is lava immediately ahead, so I cannot move forward. The goal `O` is near the lower-right area, so I need to take a safer route by heading downward first. From facing right, turning left will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area, facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is to the right on the same lower row, so I should first turn right to face east, then move toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am on the left side of the map facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is near the lower-right area, and moving forward would immediately hit lava, so I need to change direction and navigate around the lava barrier. Turning right will face me downward, which opens a path through the lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am near the lower-left area, facing down. The goal `O` is to my far right on the same row, so I need to head right. From facing down, turning left will orient me right after one turn? No, from down, a clockwise turn leads to left and counter-clockwise leads to right. So I will turn left? Actually, counter-clockwise from down is right. I should turn right? Let's choose the correct turn to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am on the left side of the map facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is near the lower-right area, and the direct path on my row is blocked by lava, so I should move forward along the safe corridor toward the right side first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
